description: Remove card view toggle and card rendering from all gestionnaire list pages. Keep list + calendar for interventions, list-only for biens/contacts/contrats. B2B SaaS best practice: tables for data-dense scanning, no card toggle.

userStories.title: Remove card view from Interventions
userStories.description: Remove cards button from ViewModeSwitcherV1, remove renderCardsView from InterventionsViewContainer, change default to 'list'. Keep list + calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: ViewModeSwitcherV1 shows only List + Calendar buttons
InterventionsViewContainer has no cards rendering branch
Default view mode is 'list' in interventions-navigator.tsx
Lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: Removed cards button from ViewModeSwitcherV1, removed renderCardsView + cardsPagination from InterventionsViewContainer, changed defaults to 'list'.

userStories.title: Remove card view from Patrimoine (Biens)
userStories.description: Remove view toggle entirely from PatrimoineNavigator, remove BuildingCardExpandable and LotCardUnified card grid rendering, always show DataTable.
acceptanceCriteria: No view toggle buttons in PatrimoineNavigator
Buildings and lots always render as DataTable
Card component imports removed
Lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: Removed BuildingCardExpandable, LotCardUnified, LayoutGrid, List imports. Removed expandedBuildings state. Changed defaultView to 'list'. Removed view toggle UI and BEM classes.

userStories.title: Update ViewMode type + cleanup defaults
userStories.description: Remove 'cards' from ViewMode type union, update all defaultMode from 'cards' to 'list', remove unused LayoutGrid imports across navigators.
acceptanceCriteria: ViewMode type is 'list' | 'calendar' (no 'cards')
All defaultMode values changed to 'list'
No unused imports remain
Full lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: ViewMode type kept with 'cards' (still used by property-selector + intervention-contacts). Default changed from 'cards' to 'list' in use-view-mode.ts, use-data-navigator.ts, patrimoine.config.tsx (x2), contacts.config.tsx (x2). Removed VIEW_MODE_CONFIG.cards dead config. Updated toggle cycle to list↔calendar. Simplified responsive default logic.
